title: thesium caespitans
intro: Thesium caespitans, also known as thyme-leaved sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the family Montiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thesium caespitans include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Thesium caespitans can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
